svg.text: There are other problems too when we change direction or try to animate the player such that his costume changes, and thus the shape changes (which effects what he is touching). You may notice that when you turn around in the bottom right of the level below,, that the cat sometimes suddenly jumps upwards? This is because when you turn him around, his ear can suddenly be touching the ground where it didn't before. For our platformer scripts to work correctly this cannot be allowed to happen, otherwise the sudden unexpected ground contacts are interpreted incorrectly and the player is moved (by our scripts) up or down through the surfaces.
